mission: Promote guide and skeleton rows into first-class template-only tasks for GEMM epilogues, MIGraphX plugins, and framework extension operators.

must_say: timing-only for HIP-event timings without profiler counters
negative example when an attempted optimization loses
must_not_claim: custom epilogue win without hipBLASLt or Composable Kernel epilogue baseline
MIGraphX plugin win without matching engine/runtime timing boundary
framework extension win without dispatch and synchronization boundary metadata

tasks.topic: custom GEMM epilogue fusion versus hipBLASLt and Composable Kernel baselines
minimal MIGraphX plugin fused op lifecycle and CUDA enqueue kernel
framework extension boundaries, tensor checks, strides, streams, and rowwise HIP op
